mapper.select: SELECT DISTINCT TRIM(nx_dg_goods_brand) FROM nx_distributer_goods WHERE nx_dg_goods_brand IS NOT NULL AND TRIM(nx_dg_goods_brand) != '' ORDER BY TRIM(nx_dg_goods_brand)

select * from nx_distributer_goods
limit #{offset}, #{limit}

select * from nx_distributer_father_goods as grand
left join nx_distributer_goods as ndg on ndg.nx_dg_dfg_goods_grand_id = grand.nx_distributer_father_goods_id and ndg.nx_dg_goods_is_hidden = 0 left join nx_goods as ng_grand on ng_grand.nx_goods_id = grand.nx_dfg_nx_goods_id left join nx_goods as ng on ng.nx_goods_id = ndg.nx_dg_nx_goods_id where grand.nx_dfg_fathers_father_id = #{grandId} order by COALESCE(ng_grand.nx_goods_sort, grand.nx_dfg_father_goods_sort), COALESCE(ng.nx_goods_sort, ndg.nx_dg_goods_sort), COALESCE(ng.nx_goods_sons_sort, ndg.nx_dg_goods_sons_sort)

select dg.*, ng.*, ds.*, da.*, njs.*, sell_user.*, ndgsg.nx_distributer_goods_shelf_goods_id, ndgsg.nx_DGSG_shelf_sort, ndgsg.nx_DGSG_dis_goods_id, ndgsg.nx_DGSG_shelf_id, ndgsg.nx_DGSG_sort, ndgsg.nx_DGSG_shelf_layer, ndgsg.nx_DGSG_is_duplicate, ndgs.nx_distributer_goods_shelf_name as shelf_name from nx_distributer_goods as dg left join nx_goods as ng on ng.nx_goods_id = dg.nx_dg_nx_goods_id left join nx_distributer_standard as ds on ds.nx_DS_dis_goods_id = dg.nx_distributer_goods_id left join nx_distributer_alias as da on da.nx_DA_dis_goods_id = dg.nx_distributer_goods_id left join nx_jrdh_supplier as njs on njs.nx_jrdh_supplier_id = dg.nx_dg_supplier_id left join nx_jrdh_user as sell_user on sell_user.nx_jrdh_user_id = njs.nx_jrdhs_user_id left join nx_distributer_goods_shelf_goods as ndgsg on ndgsg.nx_DGSG_dis_goods_id = dg.nx_distributer_goods_id left join nx_distributer_goods_shelf as ndgs on ndgs.nx_distributer_goods_shelf_id = ndgsg.nx_DGSG_shelf_id where nx_distributer_goods_id = #{disGoodsId}

select dg.*, ds.*, da.*, ndfg.*, grand.nx_distributer_father_goods_id 'grand_nx_distributer_father_goods_id', grand.nx_dfg_father_goods_name 'grand_nx_dfg_father_goods_name', grand.nx_dfg_father_goods_sort 'grand_nx_dfg_father_goods_sort', ndgsg.nx_distributer_goods_shelf_goods_id, ndgsg.nx_DGSG_shelf_sort, ndgsg.nx_DGSG_dis_goods_id, ndgsg.nx_DGSG_shelf_id, ndgsg.nx_DGSG_sort, ndgsg.nx_DGSG_shelf_layer, ndgsg.nx_DGSG_is_duplicate, ndgs.nx_distributer_goods_shelf_name as shelf_name from nx_distributer_goods as dg left join nx_distributer_standard as ds on ds.nx_DS_dis_goods_id = dg.nx_distributer_goods_id left join nx_distributer_alias as da on da.nx_DA_dis_goods_id = dg.nx_distributer_goods_id left join nx_distributer_father_goods as ndfg on ndfg.nx_distributer_father_goods_id = dg.nx_dg_dfg_goods_grand_id left join nx_distributer_father_goods as grand on grand.nx_distributer_father_goods_id = ndfg.nx_dfg_fathers_father_id left join nx_distributer_goods_shelf_goods as ndgsg on ndgsg.nx_DGSG_dis_goods_id = dg.nx_distributer_goods_id left join nx_distributer_goods_shelf as ndgs on ndgs.nx_distributer_goods_shelf_id = ndgsg.nx_DGSG_shelf_id left join nx_goods as ng on ng.nx_goods_id = dg.nx_dg_nx_goods_id where (nx_dg_goods_name like concat('%', #{searchStr}, '%') or nx_dg_goods_brand like concat('%', #{searchStr}, '%') or da.nx_da_alias_name like concat('%', #{searchStr}, '%') or nx_dg_goods_pinyin like concat('%', #{searchPinyin}, '%') or nx_dg_goods_py like concat('%', #{searchPinyin}, '%') or da.nx_DA_alias_pinyin like concat('%', #{searchPinyin}, '%') or da.nx_DA_alias_py like concat('%', #{searchPinyin}, '%') ) and nx_dg_distributer_id = #{disId} # and dg.nx_dg_goods_is_hidden = 0 order by COALESCE(ng.nx_goods_sort, dg.nx_dg_goods_sort), COALESCE(ng.nx_goods_sons_sort, dg.nx_dg_goods_sons_sort)

select *, grand.nx_distributer_father_goods_id 'grand_nx_distributer_father_goods_id', grand.nx_dfg_father_goods_name 'grand_nx_dfg_father_goods_name', grand.nx_dfg_father_goods_sort 'grand_nx_dfg_father_goods_sort' from nx_distributer_goods as dg left join nx_distributer_standard as ds on ds.nx_DS_dis_goods_id = dg.nx_distributer_goods_id left join nx_distributer_alias as da on da.nx_DA_dis_goods_id = dg.nx_distributer_goods_id left join nx_distributer_father_goods as ndfg on ndfg.nx_distributer_father_goods_id = dg.nx_dg_dfg_goods_grand_id left join nx_distributer_father_goods as grand on grand.nx_distributer_father_goods_id = ndfg.nx_dfg_fathers_father_id left join nx_distributer_goods_shelf_goods as ndgsg on ndgsg.nx_DGSG_dis_goods_id = dg.nx_distributer_goods_id left join nx_distributer_goods_shelf_stock as ndgss on ndgss.nx_dgss_nx_dis_goods_id = dg.nx_distributer_goods_id and ndgss.nx_dgss_rest_weight > 0 left join nx_goods as ng on ng.nx_goods_id = dg.nx_dg_nx_goods_id where (nx_dg_goods_name like concat('%', #{searchStr}, '%') or nx_dg_goods_brand like concat('%', #{searchStr}, '%') or da.nx_da_alias_name like concat('%', #{searchStr}, '%') or nx_dg_goods_pinyin like concat('%', #{searchPinyin}, '%') or nx_dg_goods_py like concat('%', #{searchPinyin}, '%') or da.nx_DA_alias_pinyin like concat('%', #{searchPinyin}, '%') or da.nx_DA_alias_py like concat('%', #{searchPinyin}, '%') ) and nx_dg_distributer_id = #{disId} and ndgsg.nx_DGSG_dis_goods_id is null order by COALESCE(ng.nx_goods_sort, dg.nx_dg_goods_sort), COALESCE(ng.nx_goods_sons_sort, dg.nx_dg_goods_sons_sort)

select *, grand.nx_distributer_father_goods_id 'grand_nx_distributer_father_goods_id', grand.nx_dfg_father_goods_name 'grand_nx_dfg_father_goods_name', grand.nx_dfg_father_goods_sort 'grand_nx_dfg_father_goods_sort' from nx_distributer_goods as dg left join nx_distributer_standard as ds on ds.nx_DS_dis_goods_id = dg.nx_distributer_goods_id left join nx_distributer_alias as da on da.nx_DA_dis_goods_id = dg.nx_distributer_goods_id left join nx_distributer_father_goods as ndfg on ndfg.nx_distributer_father_goods_id = dg.nx_dg_dfg_goods_grand_id left join nx_distributer_father_goods as grand on grand.nx_distributer_father_goods_id = ndfg.nx_dfg_fathers_father_id left join nx_distributer_goods_shelf_goods as ndgsg on ndgsg.nx_DGSG_dis_goods_id = dg.nx_distributer_goods_id left join nx_distributer_goods_shelf_stock as ndgss on ndgss.nx_dgss_nx_dis_goods_id = dg.nx_distributer_goods_id and ndgss.nx_dgss_rest_weight > 0 left join nx_goods as ng on ng.nx_goods_id = dg.nx_dg_nx_goods_id where (nx_dg_goods_name like concat('%', #{searchStr}, '%') or nx_dg_goods_brand like concat('%', #{searchStr}, '%') or da.nx_da_alias_name like concat('%', #{searchStr}, '%') or nx_dg_goods_pinyin like concat('%', #{searchPinyin}, '%') or nx_dg_goods_py like concat('%', #{searchPinyin}, '%') or da.nx_DA_alias_pinyin like concat('%', #{searchPinyin}, '%') or da.nx_DA_alias_py like concat('%', #{searchPinyin}, '%') ) and nx_dg_distributer_id = #{disId} and ndgsg.nx_DGSG_dis_goods_id is null and dg.nx_dg_nx_goods_id is not null and dg.nx_dg_nx_goods_id != 0 order by COALESCE(ng.nx_goods_sort, dg.nx_dg_goods_sort), COALESCE(ng.nx_goods_sons_sort, dg.nx_dg_goods_sons_sort)

select *, ds.nx_department_id 'nx_department_id', ds.nx_department_name 'nx_department_name', ds.nx_department_attr_name 'nx_department_attr_name', ds.nx_department_type 'nx_department_type', ds.nx_department_father_id 'nx_department_father_id', ds.nx_department_is_group_dep 'nx_department_is_group_dep', df.nx_department_id 'dd_nx_department_id', df.nx_department_name 'dd_nx_department_name', df.nx_department_attr_name 'dd_nx_department_attr_name',
gds.gb_department_name 'gb_department_name', gds.gb_department_attr_name 'gb_department_attr_name', gds.gb_department_type 'gb_department_type', gds.gb_department_father_id 'gb_department_father_id', gds.gb_department_is_group_dep 'gb_department_is_group_dep', gdf.gb_department_id 'dd_gb_department_id', gdf.gb_department_name 'dd_gb_department_name', gdf.gb_department_attr_name 'dd_gb_department_attr_name',
ndgsg.nx_distributer_goods_shelf_goods_id, ndgsg.nx_DGSG_shelf_sort, ndgsg.nx_DGSG_dis_goods_id, ndgsg.nx_DGSG_shelf_id, ndgsg.nx_DGSG_sort, ndgsg.nx_DGSG_shelf_layer, ndgsg.nx_DGSG_is_duplicate, ndgs.nx_distributer_goods_shelf_name as shelf_name, COALESCE(( SELECT SUM(CAST(ndgss2.nx_dgss_rest_weight AS DECIMAL(10,1))) FROM nx_distributer_goods_shelf_stock AS ndgss2 LEFT JOIN nx_distributer_goods_shelf_stock_reduce AS ir2 ON ir2.nx_dgssr_nx_stock_id = ndgss2.nx_distributer_goods_shelf_stock_id AND ir2.nx_dgssr_type = 2 WHERE ndgss2.nx_dgss_nx_shelf_goods_id = ndgsg.nx_distributer_goods_shelf_goods_id AND ndgss2.nx_dgss_rest_weight > 0 AND ndgss2.nx_dgss_status = 0 AND ir2.nx_distributer_goods_shelf_stock_reduce_id IS NULL ), 0) AS totalRestWeight
from nx_distributer_goods as ndg left join nx_department_order_history as ndo on ndo.nx_DO_dis_goods_id = ndg.nx_distributer_goods_id and ndo.nx_DO_dis_goods_id = ndg.nx_distributer_goods_id and ndo.nx_DO_distributer_id = #{disId} left join nx_department as ds on ds.nx_department_id = ndo.nx_DO_department_id left join nx_department df on ds.nx_department_father_id = df.nx_department_id left join gb_department as gds on gds.gb_department_id = ndo.nx_DO_gb_department_id left join gb_department as gdf on gdf.gb_department_id = gds.gb_department_father_id left join nx_distributer_goods_shelf_goods AS ndgsg ON ndgsg.nx_DGSG_dis_goods_id = ndg.nx_distributer_goods_id left join nx_distributer_goods_shelf AS ndgs ON ndgs.nx_distributer_goods_shelf_id = ndgsg.nx_DGSG_shelf_id where nx_dg_nx_goods_id is null and nx_dg_distributer_id = #{disId}
select * from nx_distributer_goods where nx_dg_distributer_id = 2

select dg.*, ds.*, da.*, ndfg.*, ndgsg.nx_distributer_goods_shelf_goods_id, ndgsg.nx_DGSG_shelf_sort, ndgsg.nx_DGSG_dis_goods_id, ndgsg.nx_DGSG_shelf_id, ndgsg.nx_DGSG_sort, ndgsg.nx_DGSG_shelf_layer, ndgsg.nx_DGSG_is_duplicate, ndgs.nx_distributer_goods_shelf_name as shelf_name from nx_distributer_goods as dg left join nx_distributer_standard as ds on ds.nx_DS_dis_goods_id = dg.nx_distributer_goods_id left join nx_distributer_alias as da on da.nx_DA_dis_goods_id = dg.nx_distributer_goods_id left join nx_distributer_father_goods as ndfg on ndfg.nx_distributer_father_goods_id = dg.nx_dg_dfg_goods_father_id left join nx_distributer_goods_shelf_goods as ndgsg on ndgsg.nx_DGSG_dis_goods_id = dg.nx_distributer_goods_id left join nx_distributer_goods_shelf as ndgs on ndgs.nx_distributer_goods_shelf_id = ndgsg.nx_DGSG_shelf_id left join nx_goods as ng on ng.nx_goods_id = dg.nx_dg_nx_goods_id where (nx_dg_goods_name like concat('%', #{searchStr}, '%') or nx_dg_goods_brand like concat('%', #{searchStr}, '%') or da.nx_da_alias_name like concat('%', #{searchStr}, '%') or nx_dg_goods_pinyin like concat('%', #{searchPinyin}, '%') or nx_dg_goods_py like concat('%', #{searchPinyin}, '%') or da.nx_DA_alias_pinyin like concat('%', #{searchPinyin}, '%') or da.nx_DA_alias_py like concat('%', #{searchPinyin}, '%') ) and nx_dg_distributer_id = #{disId} and nx_dg_dfg_goods_father_id = #{fatherId} order by COALESCE(ng.nx_goods_sort, dg.nx_dg_goods_sort), COALESCE(ng.nx_goods_sons_sort, dg.nx_dg_goods_sons_sort)

select ndpg.*, dg.*, nda.*, ndgsg.nx_distributer_goods_shelf_goods_id, ndgsg.nx_DGSG_shelf_sort, ndgsg.nx_DGSG_dis_goods_id, ndgsg.nx_DGSG_shelf_id, ndgsg.nx_DGSG_sort, ndgsg.nx_DGSG_shelf_layer, ndgsg.nx_DGSG_is_duplicate, ndgs.nx_distributer_goods_shelf_name as shelf_name from nx_distributer_purchase_goods as ndpg left join nx_distributer_goods as dg on ndpg.nx_DPG_dis_goods_id = dg.nx_distributer_goods_id left join nx_distributer_alias as nda on nda.nx_DA_dis_goods_id = dg.nx_distributer_goods_id left join nx_distributer_goods_shelf_goods as ndgsg on ndgsg.nx_DGSG_dis_goods_id = dg.nx_distributer_goods_id left join nx_distributer_goods_shelf as ndgs on ndgs.nx_distributer_goods_shelf_id = ndgsg.nx_DGSG_shelf_id left join nx_goods as ng on ng.nx_goods_id = dg.nx_dg_nx_goods_id where ( dg.nx_dg_goods_name like concat('%', #{searchStr}, '%') or nx_dg_goods_brand like concat('%', #{searchStr}, '%') or nda.nx_da_alias_name like concat('%', #{searchStr}, '%') or dg.nx_dg_goods_pinyin like concat('%', #{searchPinyin}, '%') or nda.nx_DA_alias_pinyin like concat('%', #{searchPinyin}, '%') or nda.nx_DA_alias_py like concat('%', #{searchPinyin}, '%') or dg.nx_dg_goods_py like concat('%', #{searchPinyin}, '%') ) and nx_dg_distributer_id = #{disId} and ndpg.nx_DPG_distributer_id = #{disId} order by COALESCE(ng.nx_goods_sort, dg.nx_dg_goods_sort), COALESCE(ng.nx_goods_sons_sort, dg.nx_dg_goods_sons_sort)
select * from nx_distributer_goods as dg left join nx_distributer as dis on dis.nx_distributer_id = dg.nx_dg_distributer_id where dg.nx_dg_nx_goods_id = #{nxGoodsId}

select dg.*, ds.*, da.*, dor.*, f.*, g.*, gg.*, nddg.*, du.*, ndgsg.nx_distributer_goods_shelf_goods_id, ndgsg.nx_DGSG_shelf_sort, ndgsg.nx_DGSG_dis_goods_id, ndgsg.nx_DGSG_shelf_id, ndgsg.nx_DGSG_sort, ndgsg.nx_DGSG_shelf_layer, ndgsg.nx_DGSG_is_duplicate, ndgs.nx_distributer_goods_shelf_name as shelf_name from nx_distributer_goods as dg left join nx_distributer_standard as ds on ds.nx_DS_dis_goods_id = dg.nx_distributer_goods_id left join nx_distributer_alias as da on da.nx_DA_dis_goods_id = dg.nx_distributer_goods_id left join nx_department_orders as dor on dor.nx_DO_dis_goods_id = dg.nx_distributer_goods_id and dor.nx_DO_purchase_status < 5 and dor.nx_DO_department_id = #{depId} left join nx_distributer_father_goods as f on f.nx_distributer_father_goods_id = dg.nx_dg_dfg_goods_father_id left join nx_distributer_father_goods as g on g.nx_distributer_father_goods_id = f.nx_dfg_fathers_father_id left join nx_distributer_father_goods as gg on gg.nx_distributer_father_goods_id = g.nx_dfg_fathers_father_id left join nx_goods as ng_dg on ng_dg.nx_goods_id = dg.nx_dg_nx_goods_id left join nx_goods as ng_f on ng_f.nx_goods_id = f.nx_dfg_nx_goods_id left join nx_goods as ng_g on ng_g.nx_goods_id = g.nx_dfg_nx_goods_id left join nx_goods as ng_gg on ng_gg.nx_goods_id = gg.nx_dfg_nx_goods_id left join nx_department_dis_goods as nddg on nddg.nx_DDG_dis_goods_id = dg.nx_distributer_goods_id and nddg.nx_DDG_department_id = #{depId} left join nx_department_user as du on du.nx_department_user_id = dor.nx_DO_order_user_id left join nx_distributer_goods_shelf_goods as ndgsg on ndgsg.nx_DGSG_dis_goods_id = dg.nx_distributer_goods_id left join nx_distributer_goods_shelf as ndgs on ndgs.nx_distributer_goods_shelf_id = ndgsg.nx_DGSG_shelf_id where (nx_dg_goods_name like concat('%', #{searchStr}, '%') or nx_dg_goods_brand like concat('%', #{searchStr}, '%') or da.nx_da_alias_name like concat('%', #{searchStr}, '%') ) and nx_dg_distributer_id = #{disId} and dg.nx_dg_goods_is_hidden = 0 order by CASE WHEN nx_dg_goods_name = #{searchStr} THEN 0 ELSE 1 END, COALESCE(ng_gg.nx_goods_sort, gg.nx_dfg_father_goods_sort), COALESCE(ng_g.nx_goods_sort, g.nx_dfg_father_goods_sort), COALESCE(ng_f.nx_goods_sort, f.nx_dfg_father_goods_sort), COALESCE(ng_dg.nx_goods_sort, dg.nx_dg_goods_sort), COALESCE(ng_dg.nx_goods_sons_sort, dg.nx_dg_goods_sons_sort)

SELECT ndg.*, njs.*, nju.*, nds.*, nda.*, ndfg.*, ng.*, ndgsg.*, ndgs.nx_distributer_goods_shelf_name as shelf_name FROM ( SELECT ndg.nx_distributer_goods_id FROM nx_distributer_goods AS ndg LEFT JOIN nx_distributer_father_goods AS ndfg ON ndfg.nx_distributer_father_goods_id = ndg.nx_dg_dfg_goods_grand_id LEFT JOIN nx_goods AS ng_sub ON ng_sub.nx_goods_id = ndg.nx_dg_nx_goods_id LEFT JOIN nx_goods AS ng_father_sub ON ng_father_sub.nx_goods_id = ndfg.nx_dfg_nx_goods_id
AND ndfg.nx_dfg_fathers_father_id = #{grandId}
AND ndg.nx_dg_goods_is_hidden = #{isHidden}
AND ndg.nx_dg_purchase_auto = #{goodsType}
AND ndg.nx_dg_supplier_id is not null and ndg.nx_dg_supplier_id > 0
AND ndg.nx_dg_carton_unit IS NOT NULL AND TRIM(ndg.nx_dg_carton_unit) != ''
AND (ndg.nx_dg_carton_unit IS NULL OR TRIM(ndg.nx_dg_carton_unit) = '')
AND ndg.nx_dg_trace_report_id IS NOT NULL
AND ndg.nx_dg_trace_report_id IS NULL
ORDER BY COALESCE(ng_father_sub.nx_goods_sort, ndfg.nx_dfg_father_goods_sort), COALESCE(ng_sub.nx_goods_sort, ndg.nx_dg_goods_sort), COALESCE(ng_sub.nx_goods_sons_sort, ndg.nx_dg_goods_sons_sort) LIMIT #{offset}, #{limit} ) AS page
JOIN nx_distributer_goods AS ndg ON ndg.nx_distributer_goods_id = page.nx_distributer_goods_id LEFT JOIN nx_goods AS ng on ng.nx_goods_id = ndg.nx_dg_nx_goods_id LEFT JOIN nx_jrdh_supplier AS njs ON ndg.nx_dg_supplier_id = njs.nx_jrdh_supplier_id LEFT JOIN nx_jrdh_user AS nju ON nju.nx_jrdh_user_id = njs.nx_jrdhs_user_id LEFT JOIN nx_distributer_standard AS nds ON nds.nx_DS_dis_goods_id = ndg.nx_distributer_goods_id LEFT JOIN nx_distributer_alias AS nda ON nda.nx_DA_dis_goods_id = ndg.nx_distributer_goods_id LEFT JOIN nx_distributer_father_goods AS ndfg ON ndfg.nx_distributer_father_goods_id = ndg.nx_dg_dfg_goods_grand_id LEFT JOIN nx_goods AS ng_father ON ng_father.nx_goods_id = ndfg.nx_dfg_nx_goods_id LEFT JOIN nx_distributer_goods_shelf_goods AS ndgsg ON ndgsg.nx_DGSG_dis_goods_id = ndg.nx_distributer_goods_id LEFT JOIN nx_distributer_goods_shelf AS ndgs ON ndgs.nx_distributer_goods_shelf_id = ndgsg.nx_DGSG_shelf_id
ORDER BY COALESCE(ng_father.nx_goods_sort, ndfg.nx_dfg_father_goods_sort), COALESCE(ng.nx_goods_sort, ndg.nx_dg_goods_sort), COALESCE(ng.nx_goods_sons_sort, ndg.nx_dg_goods_sons_sort)

select *, ds.nx_department_id 'nx_department_id', ds.nx_department_name 'nx_department_name', ds.nx_department_attr_name 'nx_department_attr_name', ds.nx_department_type 'nx_department_type', ds.nx_department_father_id 'nx_department_father_id', ds.nx_department_is_group_dep 'nx_department_is_group_dep', df.nx_department_id 'dd_nx_department_id', df.nx_department_name 'dd_nx_department_name', df.nx_department_attr_name 'dd_nx_department_attr_name',
gds.gb_department_name 'gb_department_name', gds.gb_department_attr_name 'gb_department_attr_name', gds.gb_department_type 'gb_department_type', gds.gb_department_father_id 'gb_department_father_id', gds.gb_department_is_group_dep 'gb_department_is_group_dep', gdf.gb_department_id 'dd_gb_department_id', gdf.gb_department_name 'dd_gb_department_name', gdf.gb_department_attr_name 'dd_gb_department_attr_name'
from nx_distributer_goods as ndg left join nx_department_orders as ndo on ndo.nx_DO_dis_goods_id = ndg.nx_distributer_goods_id left join nx_department as ds on ds.nx_department_id = ndo.nx_DO_department_id left join nx_department df on ds.nx_department_father_id = df.nx_department_id left join gb_department as gds on gds.gb_department_id = ndo.nx_DO_gb_department_id left join gb_department as gdf on gdf.gb_department_id = gds.gb_department_father_id where nx_dg_nx_goods_id is null

select ndg.*, ng.*, nds.*, nda.*, ndfg.*, nddg.*, ndo.*, ndgsg.nx_distributer_goods_shelf_goods_id, ndgsg.nx_DGSG_shelf_sort, ndgsg.nx_DGSG_dis_goods_id, ndgsg.nx_DGSG_shelf_id, ndgsg.nx_DGSG_sort, ndgsg.nx_DGSG_shelf_layer, ndgsg.nx_DGSG_is_duplicate, ndgs.nx_distributer_goods_shelf_name as shelf_name from nx_distributer_goods as ndg left join nx_goods as ng on ng.nx_goods_id = ndg.nx_dg_nx_goods_id left join nx_distributer_standard as nds on nds.nx_DS_dis_goods_id = ndg.nx_distributer_goods_id left join nx_distributer_alias as nda on nda.nx_DA_dis_goods_id = ndg.nx_distributer_goods_id left join nx_distributer_father_goods as ndfg on ndfg.nx_distributer_father_goods_id = ndg.nx_dg_dfg_goods_father_id left join nx_goods as ng_father on ng_father.nx_goods_id = ndfg.nx_dfg_nx_goods_id left join nx_department_dis_goods as nddg on nddg.nx_DDG_dis_goods_id = ndg.nx_distributer_goods_id and nddg.nx_DDG_department_id = #{nxDepId} left join nx_department_orders as ndo on ndo.nx_DO_dis_goods_id = ndg.nx_distributer_goods_id and ndo.nx_DO_status < 3 and ndo.nx_DO_department_id = #{nxDepId} left join nx_distributer_goods_shelf_goods as ndgsg on ndgsg.nx_DGSG_dis_goods_id = ndg.nx_distributer_goods_id left join nx_distributer_goods_shelf as ndgs on ndgs.nx_distributer_goods_shelf_id = ndgsg.nx_DGSG_shelf_id where ndfg.nx_dfg_fathers_father_id = #{grandId} and ndg.nx_dg_goods_is_hidden = #{isHidden} order by COALESCE(ng_father.nx_goods_sort, ndfg.nx_dfg_father_goods_sort), COALESCE(ng.nx_goods_sort, ndg.nx_dg_goods_sort), COALESCE(ng.nx_goods_sons_sort, ndg.nx_dg_goods_sons_sort), ndg.nx_distributer_goods_id

select dg.*, ds.*, da.*, njs.*, sell_user.*, ndgsg.nx_distributer_goods_shelf_goods_id, ndgsg.nx_DGSG_shelf_sort, ndgsg.nx_DGSG_dis_goods_id, ndgsg.nx_DGSG_shelf_id, ndgsg.nx_DGSG_sort, ndgsg.nx_DGSG_shelf_layer, ndgsg.nx_DGSG_is_duplicate, ndgs.nx_distributer_goods_shelf_name as shelf_name from nx_distributer_goods as dg left join nx_distributer_standard as ds on ds.nx_DS_dis_goods_id = dg.nx_distributer_goods_id left join nx_distributer_alias as da on da.nx_DA_dis_goods_id = dg.nx_distributer_goods_id left join nx_jrdh_supplier as njs on njs.nx_jrdh_supplier_id = dg.nx_dg_supplier_id left join nx_jrdh_user as sell_user on sell_user.nx_jrdh_user_id = njs.nx_jrdhs_user_id left join nx_distributer_goods_shelf_goods as ndgsg on ndgsg.nx_DGSG_dis_goods_id = dg.nx_distributer_goods_id left join nx_distributer_goods_shelf as ndgs on ndgs.nx_distributer_goods_shelf_id = ndgsg.nx_DGSG_shelf_id where nx_distributer_goods_id = #{disGoodsId}

select dg.*, grand.nx_distributer_father_goods_id 'grand_nx_distributer_father_goods_id', grand.nx_dfg_father_goods_name 'grand_nx_dfg_father_goods_name', grand.nx_dfg_father_goods_sort 'grand_nx_dfg_father_goods_sort', ndgs.nx_distributer_goods_shelf_name 'shelf_name', ndgsg.nx_DGSG_is_duplicate 'nx_DGSG_is_duplicate' from nx_distributer_goods as dg left join nx_distributer_standard as ds on ds.nx_DS_dis_goods_id = dg.nx_distributer_goods_id left join nx_distributer_alias as da on da.nx_DA_dis_goods_id = dg.nx_distributer_goods_id left join nx_distributer_father_goods as ndfg on ndfg.nx_distributer_father_goods_id = dg.nx_dg_dfg_goods_grand_id left join nx_distributer_father_goods as grand on grand.nx_distributer_father_goods_id = ndfg.nx_dfg_fathers_father_id inner join nx_distributer_goods_shelf_goods as ndgsg on ndgsg.nx_DGSG_dis_goods_id = dg.nx_distributer_goods_id left join nx_distributer_goods_shelf as ndgs on ndgs.nx_distributer_goods_shelf_id = ndgsg.nx_DGSG_shelf_id left join nx_distributer_goods_shelf_stock as ndgss on ndgss.nx_dgss_nx_dis_goods_id = dg.nx_distributer_goods_id and ndgss.nx_dgss_rest_weight > 0 left join nx_goods as ng on ng.nx_goods_id = dg.nx_dg_nx_goods_id where (nx_dg_goods_name like concat('%', #{searchStr}, '%') or nx_dg_goods_brand like concat('%', #{searchStr}, '%') or da.nx_da_alias_name like concat('%', #{searchStr}, '%') or nx_dg_goods_pinyin like concat('%', #{searchPinyin}, '%') or nx_dg_goods_py like concat('%', #{searchPinyin}, '%') or da.nx_DA_alias_pinyin like concat('%', #{searchPinyin}, '%') or da.nx_DA_alias_py like concat('%', #{searchPinyin}, '%') ) and nx_dg_distributer_id = #{disId} and dg.nx_dg_goods_is_hidden = 0 order by ndgsg.nx_DGSG_shelf_id, COALESCE(ng.nx_goods_sort, dg.nx_dg_goods_sort), COALESCE(ng.nx_goods_sons_sort, dg.nx_dg_goods_sons_sort)

select * from nx_distributer_goods as dg left join nx_distributer_standard as ds on ds.nx_DS_dis_goods_id = dg.nx_distributer_goods_id left join nx_distributer_alias as da on da.nx_DA_dis_goods_id = dg.nx_distributer_goods_id left join nx_distributer_goods_shelf_goods as ndgsg on ndgsg.nx_DGSG_dis_goods_id = dg.nx_distributer_goods_id left join nx_distributer_goods_shelf as ndgs on ndgs.nx_distributer_goods_shelf_id = ndgsg.nx_DGSG_shelf_id left join nx_distributer_purchase_goods as ndpg on ndpg.nx_DPG_dis_goods_id = dg.nx_distributer_goods_id and ndpg.nx_DPG_status < 3 left join nx_distributer_goods_shelf_stock as ndgss on ndgss.nx_dgss_rest_weight > 0 and ndgss.nx_dgss_nx_dis_goods_id = dg.nx_distributer_goods_id and ndgss.nx_dgss_nx_shelf_goods_id = ndgsg.nx_distributer_goods_shelf_goods_id left join nx_goods as ng on ng.nx_goods_id = dg.nx_dg_nx_goods_id where (nx_dg_goods_name like concat('%', #{searchStr}, '%') or nx_dg_goods_brand like concat('%', #{searchStr}, '%') or da.nx_da_alias_name like concat('%', #{searchStr}, '%') or nx_dg_goods_pinyin like concat('%', #{searchPinyin}, '%') or nx_dg_goods_py like concat('%', #{searchPinyin}, '%') or da.nx_DA_alias_name like concat('%', #{searchPinyin}, '%') ) and nx_dg_distributer_id = #{disId} and dg.nx_dg_goods_is_hidden = 0 and ndgsg.nx_DGSG_dis_goods_id is not null order by COALESCE(ng.nx_goods_sort, dg.nx_dg_goods_sort), COALESCE(ng.nx_goods_sons_sort, dg.nx_dg_goods_sons_sort)

select * from nx_distributer_goods as dg left join nx_distributer_standard as ds on ds.nx_DS_dis_goods_id = dg.nx_distributer_goods_id left join nx_distributer_alias as da on da.nx_DA_dis_goods_id = dg.nx_distributer_goods_id inner join nx_distributer_goods_shelf_goods as ndgsg on ndgsg.nx_DGSG_dis_goods_id = dg.nx_distributer_goods_id left join nx_distributer_goods_shelf as ndgs on ndgs.nx_distributer_goods_shelf_id = ndgsg.nx_DGSG_shelf_id left join nx_distributer_purchase_goods as ndpg on ndpg.nx_DPG_dis_goods_id = dg.nx_distributer_goods_id and ndpg.nx_DPG_status < 3 left join nx_distributer_goods_shelf_stock as ndgss on ndgss.nx_dgss_rest_weight > 0 and ndgss.nx_dgss_nx_dis_goods_id = dg.nx_distributer_goods_id and ndgss.nx_dgss_nx_shelf_goods_id = ndgsg.nx_distributer_goods_shelf_goods_id left join nx_goods as ng on ng.nx_goods_id = dg.nx_dg_nx_goods_id where (nx_dg_goods_name like concat('%', #{searchStr}, '%') or nx_dg_goods_brand like concat('%', #{searchStr}, '%') or da.nx_da_alias_name like concat('%', #{searchStr}, '%') or nx_dg_goods_pinyin like concat('%', #{searchPinyin}, '%') or nx_dg_goods_py like concat('%', #{searchPinyin}, '%') or da.nx_DA_alias_name like concat('%', #{searchPinyin}, '%') ) and nx_dg_distributer_id = #{disId} and dg.nx_dg_goods_is_hidden = 0 and dg.nx_dg_nx_goods_id is not null and dg.nx_dg_nx_goods_id != 0 order by COALESCE(ng.nx_goods_sort, dg.nx_dg_goods_sort), COALESCE(ng.nx_goods_sons_sort, dg.nx_dg_goods_sons_sort)

select count(*) from nx_distributer_goods as dg left join nx_distributer_goods_shelf_goods as ndgsg on ndgsg.nx_DGSG_dis_goods_id = dg.nx_distributer_goods_id where nx_dg_distributer_id = #{disId} and ndgsg.nx_DGSG_dis_goods_id is null

select dg.*, ds.*, da.*, ndfg.*, grand.nx_distributer_father_goods_id 'grand_nx_distributer_father_goods_id', grand.nx_dfg_father_goods_name 'grand_nx_dfg_father_goods_name', grand.nx_dfg_father_goods_sort 'grand_nx_dfg_father_goods_sort', ndgsg.nx_distributer_goods_shelf_goods_id, ndgsg.nx_DGSG_shelf_sort, ndgsg.nx_DGSG_dis_goods_id, ndgsg.nx_DGSG_shelf_id, ndgsg.nx_DGSG_sort, ndgsg.nx_DGSG_shelf_layer, ndgsg.nx_DGSG_is_duplicate, ndgs.nx_distributer_goods_shelf_name as shelf_name from nx_distributer_goods as dg left join nx_distributer_standard as ds on ds.nx_DS_dis_goods_id = dg.nx_distributer_goods_id left join nx_distributer_alias as da on da.nx_DA_dis_goods_id = dg.nx_distributer_goods_id left join nx_distributer_father_goods as ndfg on ndfg.nx_distributer_father_goods_id = dg.nx_dg_dfg_goods_grand_id left join nx_distributer_father_goods as grand on grand.nx_distributer_father_goods_id = ndfg.nx_dfg_fathers_father_id left join nx_distributer_goods_shelf_goods as ndgsg on ndgsg.nx_DGSG_dis_goods_id = dg.nx_distributer_goods_id left join nx_distributer_goods_shelf as ndgs on ndgs.nx_distributer_goods_shelf_id = ndgsg.nx_DGSG_shelf_id left join nx_goods as ng on ng.nx_goods_id = dg.nx_dg_nx_goods_id where (nx_dg_goods_name like concat('%', #{searchStr}, '%') or nx_dg_goods_brand like concat('%', #{searchStr}, '%') or da.nx_da_alias_name like concat('%', #{searchStr}, '%') or nx_dg_goods_pinyin like concat('%', #{searchPinyin}, '%') or nx_dg_goods_py like concat('%', #{searchPinyin}, '%') or da.nx_DA_alias_pinyin like concat('%', #{searchPinyin}, '%') or da.nx_DA_alias_py like concat('%', #{searchPinyin}, '%') ) and nx_dg_distributer_id = #{disId} and dg.nx_dg_nx_goods_id is not null order by COALESCE(ng.nx_goods_sort, dg.nx_dg_goods_sort), COALESCE(ng.nx_goods_sons_sort, dg.nx_dg_goods_sons_sort)

select *, grand.nx_distributer_father_goods_id 'grand_nx_distributer_father_goods_id', grand.nx_dfg_father_goods_name 'grand_nx_dfg_father_goods_name', grand.nx_dfg_father_goods_sort 'grand_nx_dfg_father_goods_sort' from nx_distributer_goods as dg left join nx_distributer_standard as ds on ds.nx_DS_dis_goods_id = dg.nx_distributer_goods_id left join nx_distributer_alias as da on da.nx_DA_dis_goods_id = dg.nx_distributer_goods_id left join nx_distributer_father_goods as ndfg on ndfg.nx_distributer_father_goods_id = dg.nx_dg_dfg_goods_grand_id left join nx_distributer_father_goods as grand on grand.nx_distributer_father_goods_id = ndfg.nx_dfg_fathers_father_id left join nx_goods as ng on ng.nx_goods_id = dg.nx_dg_nx_goods_id where (nx_dg_goods_name like concat('%', #{searchStr}, '%') or nx_dg_goods_brand like concat('%', #{searchStr}, '%') or da.nx_da_alias_name like concat('%', #{searchStr}, '%') or nx_dg_goods_pinyin like concat('%', #{searchPinyin}, '%') or nx_dg_goods_py like concat('%', #{searchPinyin}, '%') or da.nx_DA_alias_pinyin like concat('%', #{searchPinyin}, '%') or da.nx_DA_alias_py like concat('%', #{searchPinyin}, '%') ) and nx_dg_distributer_id = #{disId} and dg.nx_dg_dfg_goods_grand_id = #{grandId} and dg.nx_dg_goods_is_hidden = 0 and dg.nx_dg_nx_goods_id != -1 order by COALESCE(ng.nx_goods_sort, dg.nx_dg_goods_sort), COALESCE(ng.nx_goods_sons_sort, dg.nx_dg_goods_sons_sort)
select * from nx_distributer_goods as ndg left join nx_distributer as nd on nd.nx_distributer_id = ndg.nx_dg_distributer_id where ndg.nx_dg_nx_goods_id is null
select COUNT(*) from nx_distributer_goods as ndg where ndg.nx_dg_nx_goods_id is null and ndg.nx_dg_distributer_id = #{nxDistributerId}

select * from nx_distributer_goods as dg left join nx_goods as ng on ng.nx_goods_id = dg.nx_dg_nx_goods_id
left join nx_distributer_standard as ds on ds.nx_DS_dis_goods_id = dg.nx_distributer_goods_id left join nx_distributer_alias as da on da.nx_DA_dis_goods_id = dg.nx_distributer_goods_id left join nx_department_orders as dor on dor.nx_DO_dis_goods_id = dg.nx_distributer_goods_id and dor.nx_DO_status < 3 and dor.nx_DO_gb_department_id = #{gbDepId} left join gb_distributer_goods as gdg on gdg.gb_dg_nx_goods_id = dg.nx_dg_nx_goods_id and gdg.gb_dg_distributer_id = #{gbDisId} left join gb_department_dis_goods as gddg on gddg.gb_DDG_dis_goods_id = gdg.gb_distributer_goods_id and gddg.gb_DDG_department_id = #{gbDepId} LEFT JOIN gb_department_goods_stock AS gds ON gds.gb_dgs_gb_dep_dis_goods_id = gddg.gb_department_dis_goods_id where (nx_dg_goods_name like concat('%', #{searchStr}, '%') or nx_dg_goods_brand like concat('%', #{searchStr}, '%') or da.nx_da_alias_name like concat('%', #{searchStr}, '%') or nx_dg_goods_pinyin like concat('%', #{searchPinyin}, '%') or da.nx_DA_alias_pinyin like concat('%', #{searchPinyin}, '%') or da.nx_DA_alias_py like concat('%', #{searchPinyin}, '%') or nx_dg_goods_py like concat('%', #{searchPinyin}, '%') ) and nx_dg_distributer_id = #{disId} and nx_dg_goods_is_hidden = #{isHidden} and nx_dg_nx_goods_id is not null order by dg.nx_dg_nx_great_grand_id, COALESCE(ng.nx_goods_sort, dg.nx_dg_goods_sort), COALESCE(ng.nx_goods_sons_sort, dg.nx_dg_goods_sons_sort)

select COALESCE(Max(nx_dg_goods_sons_sort), 0) from nx_distributer_goods as ndg
and nx_dg_dfg_goods_father_id = #{dgFatherId}
mapper.update:
UPDATE nx_distributer_goods AS dg INNER JOIN nx_distributer_father_goods AS father ON father.nx_distributer_father_goods_id = dg.nx_dg_dfg_goods_father_id INNER JOIN nx_distributer_father_goods AS grand ON grand.nx_distributer_father_goods_id = father.nx_dfg_fathers_father_id INNER JOIN nx_distributer_father_goods AS greatGrand ON greatGrand.nx_distributer_father_goods_id = grand.nx_dfg_fathers_father_id SET dg.nx_dg_purchase_auto = #{type} WHERE greatGrand.nx_distributer_father_goods_id IN
#{greatGrandId}
mapper.select:
select dg.*, ds.*, da.*, dor.*, nddg.*, du.*, ndgsg.nx_distributer_goods_shelf_goods_id, ndgsg.nx_DGSG_shelf_sort, ndgsg.nx_DGSG_dis_goods_id, ndgsg.nx_DGSG_shelf_id, ndgsg.nx_DGSG_sort, ndgsg.nx_DGSG_shelf_layer, ndgsg.nx_DGSG_is_duplicate, ndgs.nx_distributer_goods_shelf_name as shelf_name from nx_distributer_goods as dg left join nx_distributer_standard as ds on ds.nx_DS_dis_goods_id = dg.nx_distributer_goods_id left join nx_distributer_alias as da on da.nx_DA_dis_goods_id = dg.nx_distributer_goods_id left join nx_department_orders as dor on dor.nx_DO_dis_goods_id = dg.nx_distributer_goods_id and dor.nx_DO_status < 3 and dor.nx_DO_department_id = #{depId} left join nx_department_dis_goods as nddg on nddg.nx_DDG_dis_goods_id = dg.nx_distributer_goods_id and nddg.nx_DDG_department_id = #{depId} left join nx_department_user as du on du.nx_department_user_id = dor.nx_DO_order_user_id left join nx_distributer_goods_shelf_goods as ndgsg on ndgsg.nx_DGSG_dis_goods_id = dg.nx_distributer_goods_id left join nx_distributer_goods_shelf as ndgs on ndgs.nx_distributer_goods_shelf_id = ndgsg.nx_DGSG_shelf_id left join nx_goods as ng on ng.nx_goods_id = dg.nx_dg_nx_goods_id where (nx_dg_goods_name = #{searchStr}
or da.nx_da_alias_name = #{searchStr} or nx_dg_goods_pinyin = #{searchPinyin} or da.nx_DA_alias_pinyin = #{searchPinyin} or da.nx_DA_alias_py = #{searchPinyin} or nx_dg_goods_py = #{searchPinyin} ) and nx_dg_distributer_id = #{disId} order by dg.nx_dg_nx_great_grand_id, COALESCE(ng.nx_goods_sort, dg.nx_dg_goods_sort), COALESCE(ng.nx_goods_sons_sort, dg.nx_dg_goods_sons_sort)
